The humor might come from the contrast between "night club" (a place where people go out at night) and "light club" (sounding like a place focused on light or brightness). "Nigut" doesn't seem to be a real word and doesn't appear to have a particular meaning. This could be a random misspelling rather than a humorous edit. It's not clear why this would be funny.
